body.question: What is FIMBY?
body.answer: FIMBY (Family In My Backyard) is a neighbourhood platform that helps you connect with your neighbours through shared stories, asks and offers, a lending library, and direct messaging. It was built to make it easy for people living near each other to share life, lend a hand, and look out for one another.

body.question: How do I update my profile?
body.answer: Tap the menu icon in the top-right corner and select Profile. From there you can edit your name, photo, pronouns, bio, and care preferences. You can also update your profile at any time from the My Stuff tab.

body.question: What are Asks and Offers?
body.answer:
Asks and Offers is a bulletin board where neighbours can post things they need (asks) or things they want to share (offers). This includes:

  • Goods – perishable and non-perishable items
  • Services – free or paid help
  • Events – neighbourhood gatherings and activities

Browse what your neighbours have posted, or create your own listing from the Create button.

body.question: How does the Library work?
body.answer:
The Library lets you share items you are willing to lend to neighbours – tools, books, games, and more. You can:

  • Browse items available in your neighbourhood
  • Add your own items for others to borrow
  • Request to borrow something you need

It is like a neighbourhood sharing shelf, managed right from the app.

body.question: Who can see my profile and posts?
body.answer: Your profile and posts are visible only to other members in your neighbourhood. FIMBY is a private community – only registered neighbours can access the platform. Your information is never shared outside your neighbourhood group.

body.question: How do I change my notification settings?
body.answer:
Go to Settings (via the menu in the top-right corner) and scroll to the Notifications section. You can toggle:

  • Push notifications on or off
  • Email summary preferences
  • Which types of updates you want to receive (messages, stories, asks and offers, library items)

body.question: How do I send a message to a neighbour?
body.answer: You can message any neighbour directly from their profile or from any post they have made. Tap their name or avatar, then select Message. All your conversations are in the Messages tab, accessible from the bottom navigation bar.

body.question: What are Stories?
body.answer: Stories are short posts you share with your neighbourhood – updates, photos, thoughts, or things happening on your street. Think of it as a neighbourhood bulletin board where everyone can share what matters to them. Stories appear in the main feed for all neighbours to see and respond to.

body.question: How do I report a problem or concern?
body.answer: If you see content that is inappropriate or experience an issue with the app, tap the three-dot menu on any post and select Report. For general app feedback or support, visit this Help page and use the contact options below. Our team reviews all reports promptly.
